subcodes.first_line: O enraptured lover! Every gathering shall be scattered and every assembly thrown into disarray, save for that company which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای واله شیداای هر جمعی پریشان گردد و هر انجمنی بیسر و سامان شود بجز جمعی که
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa
